sentences.target: On entasse les cartons dans le couloir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tas le kaʁtɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə kulwaʁ/

translations.fr: On entasse les cartons dans le couloir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tas le kaʁtɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə kulwaʁ/
translations.en: We’re piling the boxes in the hallway.
translations.es: Estamos apilando las cajas en el pasillo.
translations.de: Wir stapeln die Kartons im Flur.
translations.it: Stiamo impilando le scatole nel corridoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在把箱子堆在走廊里。
translations.yue: 我哋喺走廊度將箱堆起。
translations.pt: Estamos empilhando as caixas no corredor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chất các thùng trong hành lang.
translations.nl: We stapelen de dozen in de gang.
translations.hu: A folyosón egymásra pakoljuk a dobozokat.
translations.hi: हम गलियारे में डिब्बे ढेर कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは廊下に箱を積み上げています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/we); grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), agreeing with 'On'.
Definite article (plural) introducing the direct object noun.
Head noun (plural); direct object of 'entasse'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article (singular) determining 'couloir'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'dans', indicating location.

sentences.target: J'entasse mes vêtements dans la valise.

translations.fr: J'entasse mes vêtements dans la valise.
translations.en: I’m stuffing my clothes into the suitcase.
translations.es: Estoy metiendo mi ropa en la maleta.
translations.de: Ich stopfe meine Kleidung in den Koffer.
translations.it: Sto infilando i miei vestiti nella valigia.
translations.ko: 나는 옷을 여행가방에 꾹꾹 눌러 넣고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把衣服塞进行李箱。
translations.yue: 我將我啲衫塞入行李喼。
translations.ru: Я запихиваю свою одежду в чемодан.
translations.pt: Estou enfiando minhas roupas na mala.
translations.he: אני דוחס את הבגדים שלי למזוודה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nhét quần áo vào vali.
translations.nl: Ik prop mijn kleren in de koffer.
translations.uk: Я запихаю свій одяг у валізу.
translations.hi: मैं अपने कपड़े सूटकेस में ठूँस रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Χώνω τα ρούχα μου στη βαλίτσα.
translations.nb: Jeg stapper klærne mine ned i kofferten.
translations.id: Saya menyumpal pakaian ke dalam koper.
translations.sv: Jag trycker in mina kläder i resväskan.
translations.da: Jeg propper mit tøj ned i kufferten.
translations.ja: 私は服をスーツケースに詰め込んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before vowel; grammatical subject.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular).
Possessive determiner (plural) modifying 'vêtements'.
Head noun (plural); direct object of 'entasse'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (feminine singular) determining 'valise'.
Noun; object of 'dans', indicating the container/location.

sentences.target: Ils entassent tout sur le canapé.

translations.fr: Ils entassent tout sur le canapé.
translations.en: They’re piling everything on the couch.
translations.es: Están amontonando todo en el sofá.
translations.de: Sie stapeln alles auf dem Sofa.
translations.ko: 그들은 모든 것을 소파 위에 쌓고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把所有东西都堆在沙发上。
translations.yue: 佢哋將所有嘢都堆喺梳化上面。
translations.pt: Eles estão empilhando tudo no sofá.
translations.vi: Họ đang chất mọi thứ lên ghế sofa.
translations.ar: إنهم يكدّسون كل شيء على الأريكة.
translations.nl: Ze stapelen alles op de bank.
translations.hi: वे सब कुछ सोफ़े पर ढेर कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Mereka menumpuk semua barang di sofa.
translations.ja: 彼らはすべてをソファの上に積み上げています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person plural); grammatical subject.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person plural).
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object of 'entassent'.
Preposition introducing a locative/surface complement.
Definite article (singular) determining 'canapé'.
Noun; object of 'sur', head of the prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: Arrête d'entasser les papiers sur le bureau.
sentences.reading: /aʁɛt d‿ɑ̃tase le papje syʁ lə byʁo/

translations.fr: Arrête d'entasser les papiers sur le bureau.
translations.ipa: /aʁɛt d‿ɑ̃tase le papje syʁ lə byʁo/
translations.en: Stop piling the papers on the desk.
translations.es: Deja de amontonar los papeles en el escritorio.
translations.de: Hör auf, die Papiere auf dem Schreibtisch zu stapeln.
translations.it: Smetti di accatastare i fogli sulla scrivania.
translations.ko: 책상 위에 종이를 쌓는 것을 그만해.
translations.zh-Hans: 别再把纸堆在桌子上了。
translations.yue: 唔好再喺書檯上面堆啲紙。
translations.pt: Pare de empilhar os papéis na mesa.
translations.he: תפסיק לערום את הניירות על השולחן.
translations.tr: Masaya kağıtları üst üste koymayı bırak.
translations.vi: Đừng chất giấy tờ lên bàn nữa.
translations.ar: توقف عن تكديس الأوراق على المكتب.
translations.nl: Stop met het stapelen van papieren op het bureau.
translations.hu: Ne halmozd a papírokat az asztalra.
translations.hi: मेज़ पर कागज़ों का ढेर लगाना बंद करो.
translations.el: Σταμάτα να στοιβάζεις τα χαρτιά στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Slutt å stable papirene på skrivebordet.
translations.ro: Nu mai îngrămădi hârtiile pe birou.
translations.da: Hold op med at stable papirer på skrivebordet.
translations.ja: 机の上に紙を積み重ねるのをやめて。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in imperative mood (2nd person singular), issuing a command.
Preposition 'de' elided before vowel; links to the infinitive 'entasser' (complement of 'arrêter').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'arrêter de'.
Definite article (plural) determining 'papiers' (object of 'entasser').
Noun (plural); direct object of 'entasser'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article (singular) determining 'bureau'.
Noun; object of 'sur', indicating the location.
